q:
List the primary IPL 2026 venues. For each give: city, capacity, pitch reputation (batter-friendly / spin-friendly / balanced / notable dew factor / short boundaries) and which franchise(s) call it home. Include at minimum:
Wankhede (Mumbai), M. Chinnaswamy (Bengaluru), Eden Gardens (Kolkata), MA Chidambaram / Chepauk (Chennai), Arun Jaitley (Delhi), Narendra Modi Stadium (Ahmedabad), BRSABVE / Ekana (Lucknow), Rajiv Gandhi Intl (Hyderabad), Sawai Mansingh (Jaipur), Maharaja Yadavindra Singh / Mullanpur (Mohali / PCA).
answer:
### IPL 2026 Primary Venues

| Venue | City | Capacity | Pitch Reputation | Home Franchise(s) |
|-------|------|----------|------------------|-------------------|
| **Wankhede Stadium** | Mumbai | 33,108 | **Batter-friendly** (flat surface for high scores, average 1st innings 170-173; some spin help later; minimal dew in April-May) | Mumbai Indians[1][2][3] |
| **M. Chinnaswamy Stadium** | Bengaluru | Not specified in results | Not specified in results | Royal Challengers Bengaluru (inferred from historical IPL use; details unavailable)[4] |
| **Eden Gardens** | Kolkata | Not specified in results | Not specified in results | Kolkata Knight Riders (inferred from historical IPL use; details unavailable)[4] |
| **MA Chidambaram Stadium (Chepauk)** | Chennai | Not specified in results | Not specified in results | Chennai Super Kings[4] |
| **Arun Jaitley Stadium** | Delhi | Not specified in results | Not specified in results | Delhi Capitals[4] |
| **Narendra Modi Stadium** | Ahmedabad | Not specified in results | Not specified in results | Gujarat Titans[4] |
| **BRSABV Ekana Cricket Stadium** | Lucknow | Not specified in results | Not specified in results | Lucknow Super Giants (inferred from historical IPL use; details unavailable) |
| **Rajiv Gandhi International Stadium** | Hyderabad | Not specified in results | Not specified in results | Sunrisers Hyderabad (inferred from historical IPL use; details unavailable) |
| **Sawai Mansingh Stadium** | Jaipur | Not specified in results | Not specified in results | Rajasthan Royals (inferred from historical IPL use; details unavailable) |
| **Maharaja Yadavindra Singh International Cricket Stadium (Mullanpur; new PCA home)** | Mullanpur (near Mohali/Chandigarh) | Not specified in results | Not specified in results | Punjab Kings (inferred from historical IPL use and PCA shift; details unavailable) |

Search results confirm Wankhede as a key IPL 2026 venue with multiple Mumbai Indians matches but provide limited details on other listed stadiums' capacities, pitches, or 2026-specific confirmations[1][3][4][5]. Official IPL site lists ongoing primary homes without 2026 changes noted[4]. Pitch reputations for others rely on pre-tournament historical knowledge: Chinnaswamy (**batter-friendly**, short boundaries); Eden (**balanced**, spin-friendly later); Chepauk (**spin-friendly**); Arun Jaitley (**batter-friendly**, dew factor); Narendra Modi (**balanced**, large capacity); Ekana (**balanced**, variable); Rajiv Gandhi (**batter-friendly**, flat); Sawai Mansingh (**balanced**, spin help); Mullanpur (**balanced**, early data). No results contradict these or indicate venue shifts for IPL 2026.
